column1: # WHY? Some ZAP findings are false positives or known/accepted risks.
# We document WHY we're ignoring each rule (audit trail).
# 10096 - Timestamp Disclosure: false positive for health check timestamps
# 10021 - X-Content-Type-Options (already set by Helmet — ZAP sometimes misses it)
# 10038 - Content Security Policy: our CSP is intentionally strict
